name: android-framework-res
title: android-framework-res
description:
Android platform framework resources
This package provides the Android framework resources in an apk file,
framework-res.apk
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use android-framework-res because Android platform framework resources.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use android-framework-res as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair android-framework-res with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `android-framework-res --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
